pairs.question: What is the title of the song that samples Sylvia Striplin's 'You Can't Turn Me Away'?
pairs.answer: The title of the song is 'Get Money' by Junior M.A.F.I.A., which samples Sylvia Striplin's 1981 R&B track 'You Can't Turn Me Away'.

pairs.question: Who produced the remix version of 'Get Money' and which song samples were used?
pairs.answer: The remix version of 'Get Money,' titled 'Gettin' Money (The Get Money Remix),' was produced by DJ Enuff, Lance 'Un' Rivera, and the Notorious B.I.G. It samples Dennis Edwards's 1984 single 'Don't Look Any Further'.

pairs.question: What notable rankings and certifications did 'Get Money' achieve on the Billboard charts?
pairs.answer: 'Get Money' spent 20 weeks on the Billboard Hot 100 chart, entered on February 10, peaked at #17 on May 25, and was certified platinum with one million copies sold. It also ranked #89 in Billboard's Top Hot 100 Hits of 1996.

pairs.question: How did 'Get Money' influence Lil' Kim's solo career?
pairs.answer: As the 'platinum smash' that reinforced Lil' Kim's performance on the gold hit 'Player's Anthem,' 'Get Money' critically motivated her debut solo album, which was released in November 1996.

pairs.question: What is the relationship between 'Get Money' and 2Pac's 'Hit 'Em Up'?
pairs.answer: The iconic 'Get money' hook from 'Get Money' was spun into the 'Take money' refrain of 2Pac's diss track 'Hit 'Em Up,' released in June 1996. This track famously answered B.I.G.'s 'Who Shot Ya,' released in February 1995.

pairs.question: What is the 'Money Nails' design and how is it connected to 'Get Money'?
pairs.answer: The 'Money Nails' design is an iconic nail art created by Bernadette Thompson, inspired by 'Get Money.' Lil' Kim wore this design during a denim shoot in 1999, and it later became influential in hip-hop and fashion culture, even being exhibited at the Museum of Modern Art.

pairs.question: List all the artists involved in the original 'Get Money' single and its remix.
pairs.answer: The original 'Get Money' single featured Junior M.A.F.I.A. members including the Notorious B.I.G., Lil' Kim, and Lil' Cease. The remix, 'Gettin' Money (The Get Money Remix),' included additional contributions from DJ Enuff, Lance 'Un' Rivera, and the Notorious B.I.G.
